name: Fault Tolerance & High Availability
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq pv && curl -ssLo init-ft/pscript https://raw.githubusercontent.com/paxtonhare/demo-magic/master/demo-magic.sh && chmod +x init-ft/pscript init-ft/prompt.sh && wget -q https://github.com/yugabyte/yb-sample-apps/releases/download/v${YB_SAMPLE_APPS_VERSION}/yb-sample-apps.jar && echo "✅ FT exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 6 && echo "" && echo "▶  Demo:      cd init-ft && bash prompt.sh" && echo "▶  YSQL load: java -jar yb-sample-apps.jar --workload SqlInserts --num_reads 15000000 --num_writes 2000000 --num_threads_read 5 --num_threads_write 2 --nodes ${HOST_LB}:5433,${HOST_LB2}:5433,${HOST_LB3}:5433 --password ${SECRET} --username ${YB_USER}" && echo "▶  YCQL load: java -jar yb-sample-apps.jar --workload CassandraKeyValue --num_reads 15000000 --num_writes 2000000 --num_threads_read 5 --num_threads_write 2 --nodes ${HOST_LB}:9042,${HOST_LB2}:9042,${HOST_LB3}:9042 --password ${SECRET} --username ${YB_USER}"'
